Event: Magic Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 20/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI256
Magic Lace Ring

Once in a while, the unit launches a magic orb at a random enemy unit. The orb bounces up to 4 times. When a target is hit, its stats are reduced by 10% for 3 sec., it receives 192000 pure damage and has a 65% chance to be stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
